name: /prompt-eval: emitted JSON includes per-record array with {input_index, passed, actual, expected} for failure triage
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents prompts/rsc-reviewer && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"x","expected":"y"}' > evals/datasets/agents/rsc-reviewer.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" rsc-reviewer --version 2.1.0 && grep -E "\"records\":\[" prompts/eval-history/rsc-reviewer/2.1.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
